errors.permissionDeniedDefault: You do not have permission to view this area. Ask an administrator to update your role.
errors.dashboardMetricsDenied: You do not have access to the company dashboard metrics.
errors.systemSettingsDenied: System settings require company administration access.

nav.sidebarFootnote: Signed in securely. Tokens stay in httpOnly cookies.

subscription.banner: Your {platform} workspace subscription is not active. Open billing to pay and restore access to CRM, inventory, and billing tools.

footer.blurb: Operations software for modern businesses—CRM, inventory, billing, and teams in one workspace.
footer.tagline: Built for teams who outgrow spreadsheets.

home.headline: Run operations with clarity—every company, one polished platform.
home.subhead: CRM, inventory, quotes, invoices, customer payments, subscriptions, and team administration in a single production-grade workspace—built for businesses that have outgrown spreadsheets.
home.mobileHint: Store listings are coming soon. Buttons are placeholders for App Store and Google Play—subscribe to updates from your workspace once you sign up.
home.card1Body: Customers, suppliers, stock, and audit trails scoped per company.
home.card2Body: Quotes, invoices, Paystack (tenant or platform), and subscriptions.
home.card3Body: Invites, roles, row-level permissions, and a dashboard that leaders trust.
home.ctaSectionBody: Walk through modules, permissions, and how your workspace goes from signup to first invoice.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Use your workspace credentials. Sessions use secure cookies.

setup.title: Create workspace
setup.description: Create a new workspace: your company profile, owner account, and a trial subscription to {platform}.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.description: We'll email you a link to choose a new password.
forgot.devHint: Development: email may be unavailable—use this link once:

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset.success: Password updated — you can sign in now
reset.missingDesc: Use the link from your email, or request a new reset from sign in.

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.description: Set a password to join your team workspace.
invite.invalidDesc: Open the full link from your invitation email. If it expired, ask an admin to send a new invite.

payment.successDesc: Thanks. Your payment has been received and is being applied to your invoice.
payment.failedDesc: Your payment did not complete. You can retry using the payment link in your invoice email.
payment.pendingDesc: We are confirming your payment. This usually resolves shortly.

billing.successDesc: Thank you. Your workspace subscription will update shortly after Paystack confirms the charge.
billing.pendingDesc: If you completed payment, confirmation may take a moment.

publicDoc.unavailableBody: This link is invalid, expired, or the document is no longer available.
